//: ADVANCED: a local harness-mcp-proxy config that hosts the LSP shim, for aggregating it with other local MCP services. For simple LSP enablement, use top-level lsp.enable=true.
//wiring: Point harness's mcp.local.command at `harness-mcp-proxy` with args [serve, -stdio, -config, <this file>]. The shim runs with -namespace "" (bare names) so the PROXY namespaces its tools to mcp__lsp__*. harness must be on PATH (or use an absolute command).
